scripts.build: npm run build -w portal && npm run build -w engine
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package -w engine
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run package:win -w engine
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run package:mac -w engine
scripts.dist:mac: npm run package:mac && zip -j event-horizon-macos.zip engine/dist/event-horizon
scripts.dist:win: npm run package:win && zip -j event-horizon-windows.zip engine/dist/event-horizon.exe
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:source && npm run dist:mac && npm run dist:win
